                  +------------------+
                  |  Request Router  |
                  +---------+--------+
                            |
                            |
+---------------------------++----------------------------+
|  Handler Group            |                             |
|         +--+--------------++------------------+         |
|         v                  v                  v         |
|  +-------------+    +-------------+    +-------------+  |
|  |  Handler 1  |    |  Handler 2  |    |  Handler 3  |  |
|  +-------------+    +-------------+    +-------------+  |
|                                                         |
|                                                         |
+---------------------------------------------------------+
